headline: IFF Refocuses On Core Ingredients As Stock Trades Below Targets
summary: International Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE:IFF) is divesting its Food Ingredients segment to CVC Capital Partners while keeping a minority stake. The company is also launching an experimental field in Grasse, France, called Domaine des Naturels LMR to support research and education in natural ingredients. For readers tracking NYSE:IFF, these moves speak directly to where the business wants to concentrate time and capital. IFF has long operated across flavors, fragrances and related ingredient...
